pairs.warning_en: Using together can increase irritation significantly. Best to alternate nights or use at different times of day.
pairs.warning_zh: 同时使用可能显著增加刺激。建议隔夜交替使用或在不同时段使用。

pairs.warning_en: Both can cause irritation. Alternate nights when starting out. Can combine once skin is tolerant.
pairs.warning_zh: 两者都可能引起刺激。开始时隔夜交替。皮肤耐受后可以组合。

pairs.warning_en: Using together can increase dryness and irritation. Alternate nights, or use BHA in AM and retinol in PM.
pairs.warning_zh: 同时使用可能增加干燥和刺激。隔夜交替，或早上用BHA晚上用视黄醇。

pairs.warning_en: Benzoyl peroxide can oxidize and deactivate retinol. Use at different times of day (BP in AM, retinol in PM).
pairs.warning_zh: 过氧化苯甲酰可能氧化并使视黄醇失活。应在不同时段使用（BP早上，视黄醇晚上）。

pairs.warning_en: Old myth that they cancel out. Modern research shows they can be used together safely. Different pH optima but not a problem in practice.
pairs.warning_zh: 旧说法认为两者会相互抵消是误解。现代研究表明可以安全地一起使用。最佳pH不同但实际上不成问题。

pairs.warning_en: All retinoids (retinol, retinal, tretinoin, adapalene, tazarotene) should be avoided during pregnancy due to teratogenic risk.
pairs.warning_zh: 孕期应避免使用所有视黄醇类成分（视黄醇、视黄醛、维A酸、阿达帕林、他扎罗汀），因有致畸风险。

pairs.warning_en: BP degrades tretinoin. Apply at different times. Note: adapalene is stable with BP (as in Epiduo).
pairs.warning_zh: BP会降解维A酸。在不同时间使用。注意：阿达帕林与BP可同时使用（如Epiduo）。

pairs.warning_en: Effective proven combination for acne. Available as Epiduo/Epiduo Forte. Can be applied together.
pairs.warning_zh: 经证实的有效痤疮组合。即Epiduo/Epiduo Forte。可以同时涂抹。

pairs.warning_en: Old myth they cancel out or form niacin. Modern formulations are fine together. Both work at different pH ranges but are safe to combine.
pairs.warning_zh: 旧说法认为两者会抵消或生成烟酸是误解。现代配方可以一起使用。两者在不同pH范围工作但可安全组合。

pairs.warning_en: Can form trace amounts of benzene when exposed to heat and light. Modern formulations minimize this risk, but avoid if concerned.
pairs.warning_zh: 暴露于高温和光照时可能形成微量苯。现代配方已最小化此风险，但如有担忧可避免。

pairs.warning_en: L-ascorbic acid may reduce copper peptide efficacy by interacting with the copper ion. Use at different times of day.
pairs.warning_zh: 左旋维C可能通过与铜离子相互作用降低铜肽效力。应在不同时段使用。

pairs.warning_en: Ferulic acid doubles the photoprotective effect of Vitamins C+E. The gold standard antioxidant combination.
pairs.warning_zh: 阿魏酸使维C+维E的光防护效果翻倍。黄金标准抗氧化组合。

pairs.warning_en: Vitamin E regenerates oxidized Vitamin C. Synergistic antioxidant pair. Best combined with ferulic acid.
pairs.warning_zh: 维生素E能再生被氧化的维生素C。协同抗氧化组合。最好搭配阿魏酸。

pairs.warning_en: Combining AHA + BHA increases irritation risk. If using both, start slowly and monitor for over-exfoliation (redness, peeling, sensitivity).
pairs.warning_zh: AHA+BHA组合增加刺激风险。如同时使用，缓慢开始并监测过度去角质（泛红、脱皮、敏感）。

pairs.warning_en: Safe to use together. Niacinamide can help reduce irritation from glycolic acid.
pairs.warning_zh: 可以一起安全使用。烟酰胺可以帮助减少乙醇酸带来的刺激。

pairs.warning_en: Excellent combination for acne-prone skin. Niacinamide reduces inflammation while BHA clears pores.
pairs.warning_zh: 痤疮易发皮肤的优秀组合。烟酰胺减少炎症，BHA清洁毛孔。

pairs.warning_en: Can cause temporary dark staining of the skin. Do not apply simultaneously. Use at different times.
pairs.warning_zh: 可能导致皮肤暂时变色。不要同时涂抹。在不同时间使用。

pairs.warning_en: BP is a strong oxidizer and can deactivate Vitamin C. Use at different times (BP in AM, Vit C in PM or vice versa).
pairs.warning_zh: BP是强氧化剂，可能使维C失活。在不同时间使用。

pairs.warning_en: Low pH from AHAs may destabilize copper peptides. Use at different times of day.
pairs.warning_zh: AHA的低pH可能使铜肽不稳定。在一天中不同时间使用。

pairs.warning_en: Can be used together, but some formulation chemists suggest using at different times for optimal efficacy.
pairs.warning_zh: 可以一起使用，但部分配方师建议在不同时间使用以获得最佳效果。

ingredients_zh: 甲氧基肉桂酸乙基己酯
pairs.warning_en: Octinoxate can destabilize avobenzone, reducing UVA protection. Look for formulations with stabilizers like octocrylene.
pairs.warning_zh: 甲氧基肉桂酸乙基己酯可能使阿伏苯宗不稳定，降低UVA防护。选择含稳定剂（如奥克立林）的配方。

pairs.warning_en: Octocrylene stabilizes avobenzone, maintaining UVA protection. Common and effective combination in sunscreens.
pairs.warning_zh: 奥克立林稳定阿伏苯宗，维持UVA防护。防晒产品中常见且有效的组合。

pairs.warning_en: Complementary mineral filters. ZnO covers UVA, TiO2 covers UVB. Together they provide broad-spectrum mineral protection.
pairs.warning_zh: 互补的矿物过滤剂。氧化锌覆盖UVA，二氧化钛覆盖UVB。组合提供广谱矿物防护。

pairs.warning_en: Proven synergistic combination (Kligman's formula: hydroquinone + tretinoin + steroid). Enhances brightening efficacy.
pairs.warning_zh: 经证实的协同组合（Kligman配方：对苯二酚+维A酸+类固醇）。增强美白效果。

pairs.warning_en: Avoid during pregnancy. Significant systemic absorption (35-45%) makes it unsafe for pregnant women.
pairs.warning_zh: 孕期避免。显著的系统性吸收（35-45%）使其对孕妇不安全。

pairs.warning_en: Do not use for more than 3-5 months continuously. Prolonged use can cause ochronosis (paradoxical darkening). Cycle on and off.
pairs.warning_zh: 不要连续使用超过3-5个月。长期使用可能导致褐黄病（矛盾性变黑）。间歇性使用。

pairs.warning_en: Safe together in modern formulations. Old concern about niacin formation is not relevant at cosmetic pH levels.
pairs.warning_zh: 在现代配方中可以安全同用。旧的关于生成烟酸的担忧在化妆品pH水平下不成立。

pairs.warning_en: HA helps counteract dryness from retinol. Excellent pairing—apply HA first, then retinol.
pairs.warning_zh: HA帮助抵消视黄醇导致的干燥。优秀搭配——先涂HA，再涂视黄醇。

pairs.warning_en: Ceramides help repair barrier damage that retinoids can cause. Excellent supporting ingredient when using retinoids.
pairs.warning_zh: 神经酰胺帮助修复视黄醇类可能造成的屏障损伤。使用视黄醇类时的优秀辅助成分。

pairs.warning_en: Centella soothes irritation from retinoids. Popular combination in K-beauty for anti-aging without irritation.
pairs.warning_zh: 积雪草舒缓视黄醇类引起的刺激。韩国护肤中抗衰老无刺激的热门组合。

pairs.warning_en: Category X teratogen. Strictly avoid all forms of tretinoin during pregnancy.
pairs.warning_zh: X类致畸剂。孕期严格避免所有形式的维A酸。

pairs.warning_en: Retinoid—avoid during pregnancy as a precaution despite limited human data.
pairs.warning_zh: 视黄醇类——尽管人体数据有限，作为预防措施孕期应避免。

pairs.warning_en: Low concentrations (≤2% in wash-off products) are generally considered safe. Avoid high-concentration peels during pregnancy.
pairs.warning_zh: 低浓度（冲洗产品中≤2%）通常被认为安全。孕期避免高浓度去角质。

ingredients_zh: 甲氧基肉桂酸乙基己酯
pairs.warning_en: Potential endocrine disruptor. Many dermatologists recommend mineral sunscreen filters during pregnancy instead.
pairs.warning_zh: 潜在内分泌干扰物。许多皮肤科医生建议孕期改用矿物防晒过滤剂。

pairs.warning_en: Under regulatory scrutiny for hormonal effects. Consider mineral sunscreen alternatives during pregnancy.
pairs.warning_zh: 因激素影响正受监管审查。孕期建议考虑矿物防晒替代品。

pairs.warning_en: Complementary brightening mechanisms. Niacinamide reduces melanin transfer, TXA inhibits melanin production. Excellent combo for hyperpigmentation.
pairs.warning_zh: 互补的美白机制。烟酰胺减少黑色素转移，传明酸抑制黑色素生成。治疗色素沉着的优秀组合。

pairs.warning_en: Excellent pairing. HA hydrates while niacinamide strengthens barrier. No interaction concerns.
pairs.warning_zh: 优秀搭配。HA保湿，烟酰胺增强屏障。无相互作用方面的担忧。

pairs.warning_en: Great combination for acne and hyperpigmentation. Both are gentle and pregnancy-safe.
pairs.warning_zh: 治疗痤疮和色素沉着的优秀组合。两者都温和且孕期安全。

pairs.warning_en: Can be combined for enhanced anti-aging effect. Bakuchiol may improve retinol tolerability.
pairs.warning_zh: 可以组合以增强抗衰老效果。补骨脂酚可能改善视黄醇的耐受性。
